data.current_description: Authenticates a seller using Basic Auth credentials and returns an OAuth2 bearer token. The returned token must be refreshed every 6 months.
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a seller using Basic Auth credentials (Base64-encoded consumer_key:consumer_secret) and returns an OAuth2 bearer token for subsequent API requests. The returned access token has a 6-month expiration and must be refreshed before expiry. Requires the AccessTokenRequest body with grant_type and scope parameters. Returns AccessTokenResponse containing the bearer token, token type, and expiration details.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on input requirements (Basic Auth format, request body structure) and output details (what fields are returned). Added specifics about Base64 encoding format, required request body parameters, and response structure to improve AI agent understanding of how to construct and use this operation.

message: Operation 'createListing' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too generic and missing critical details. Added authentication requirement (bearer token), specific input structure reference (CreateListingRequest), output details (listing ID and confirmation), and side effect (immediate availability). This helps AI agents understand authentication needs, what data to provide, what to expect in response, and the operational impact.

data.current_summary: Create a new event ticket listing
data.current_description: Creates a new inventory listing for event tickets including products, pricing, and stock details.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new inventory listing for event tickets with product information, pricing, and stock details. Requires bearer token authentication. Accepts CreateListingRequest containing event details, product specifications, pricing information, and stock quantities. Returns CreateListingResponse with the created listing ID and confirmation details. The listing becomes immediately available for sale upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic and missing critical details. data.current_description: Registers a new webhook subscription for receiving event notifications. Webhook setup requires 24-48 hour approval before callbacks begin.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new webhook subscription for receiving event notifications. Requires bearer token authentication. Accepts WebhookSubscriptionRequest containing the webhook URL, authentication credentials, and subscription event types. Returns WebhookSubscriptionResponse with subscription confirmation. Note: Webhook callbacks will not begin until the subscription is approved by StubHub, which typically requires 24-48 hours. During this period, the subscription status is pending.
data.reasoning: Description mentions approval timeline but lacks input/output details and authentication requirements.
